case_title: BENJAMIN, ANTHONY VS MEEKS JR., PARKER

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BENJAMIN, ANTHONY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MEEKS JR., PARKER DEFENDANT PERKER, MEEKS JR. INCORRECTLY NAMED IN COMPLAINT AS PARKER MEEKS JR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CONTINUED TO 8:00 A.M. ON 6/12/06 TO BE HEARD BY VISITING JUDGE. COMMISSIONER SLAVIT HAS RECUSED HIMSELF ON THIS CASE.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUN-12-2006, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUL-31-2006 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. DEFENDANT AGREED TO THE CONTINUANCE. CASE TO BE HEARD AT 8:00 AM.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MEEKS JR., PARKER
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUL-31-2006, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUL-31-2006 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506 CONTINUED BY COURT FOR SAME DAY AT 5:30PM. BOTH PARTIES ADVISED BY TELEPHONE.
PLTF' REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE. ORDER SUBMITTED TO COMMISSIONER. $IFP FEE.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY BENJAMIN, ANTHONY AS TO DEFENDANT MEEKS JR., PARKER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-30-2006 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAY-30-2006, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUN-12-2006 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 CONTINUED TO 6/12/06 AT 8:00 A.M. FOR SPECIAL HEARING BY VISITING JUDGE.
CASE WILL BE HEARD AT 8:00 AM IN DEPT 506
